allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\dev\\MaXPos\\backend; $packages = "filament/filament","stancl/tenancy","spatie/laravel-permission","laravel/sanctum","laravel/cashier","pestphp/pest","laravel/pint"; foreach \($p in $packages\) { $v = composer show $p --format=json 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($v\) { Write-Output \($p + " => " + $v.versions[0]\) } })

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\dev\\MaXPos\\backend; $models = @\("Gestiune","Group","Article","Barcode","Customer","StockLevel"\); foreach \($m in $models\) { php artisan make:filament-resource $m --generate --no-interaction 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2 })
